description:
Daily 8 AM PHT cron — Track 2 janitor for Stage 7 (Assessment Sent)
applicants.

For each Stage-7 applicant past the 48h threshold:
- Identify which of the 3 assessments are still incomplete; if any
  missing, email a partial-link reminder. Cascades:
    - first miss → General Follow-up Reminder (reuses Track 1 template)
      + stamp x_studio_assessment_reminder_date
    - second miss → Final Reminder + stamp
      x_studio_assessment_final_reminder_date
    - third miss → archive with "Refuse did not complete assessment"
- All done → check scoring_success on each input:
    - Any failed → kanban_state=blocked + REVIEW NEEDED chatter
    - All passed → advance to Stage 10 (Passed Assessment)

Ships the create_field for x_studio_assessment_reminder_date (missing
on dev), the Score Below Passing Threshold template (for HR's manual
refusal of failed-assessment candidates), the SA, and the cron.

DEPENDS on changeset 009 — Track 2 reuses Track 1's three templates
(general/final/non-response) by name. Deploy 009 first.

model_id=662 (hr.applicant).
